title: AWS positioned highest in execution in the latest Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cloud Database Management Systems
text: AWS has been named a Leader for the 11th consecutive year in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cloud Database Management Systems. And, once again, AWS has been positioned highest among all 20 evaluated companies for our Ability to Execute. We believe this reflects our ongoing commitment to giving customers the broadest and deepest set of capabilities to accelerate innovation as well as unparalleled security, reliability, and performance they can trust for their most critical applications.
